examples: The shop charges up to $500 to tune up a Porsche.
As I completed my 26th lap the Porsche puffed blue smoke.
He really snowed me with all his talk of buying a Porsche.
This new Harley has a liquid-cooled V-twin 1, 130cc engine, developed with Porsche, that runs at 115hp.
The revised adaptive cruise control system is now offered with Porsche Active Safe (PAS).
